description: WebFlash-compatible firmware build matrix and the sole release-eligibility source of truth. Each entry is validated by tests/validate_webflash_builds.py against config/webflash-compatibility.json. Concrete preview / advanced-preview release targets for every buildable product (including the fan-driver and TRIAC targets that are NOT WebFlash-importable) are enumerated in config/preview-release-targets.json (RELEASE-PREVIEW-TARGETS-ALL-PRODUCTS-001); a row is added here only with recorded build proof. RELEASE-PREVIEW-WEBFLASH-BUILD-ROWS-001 added the three preview rows for the compile-validated room-bundle preview targets (Ceiling-POE-AirIQ-RoomIQ, Ceiling-POE-RoomIQ, Ceiling-POE-RoomIQ-LED), each addressed via its products/webflash wrapper, on the preview (non-stable) channel with hosted-compile evidence (run 26821900127); those rows are release-eligibility METADATA only (release_state: metadata-ready-unpublished) — no firmware binary, GitHub Release, tag, manifest.json, or firmware/sources.json is produced, and the consuming candidate bundles stay hidden / not buyable. The stable Release-One row (Ceiling-POE-VentIQ-RoomIQ) and the published VentIQ LED preview row are unchanged.

builds.stable_blocker: LED preview-to-stable gauntlet (operator flash proof, bench verification, stable promotion).

builds.release_note_warning: PREVIEW FIRMWARE — buildable and installable for testers only. This build is NOT hardware verified, NOT stable, NOT recommended, and NOT a customer default. No bench evidence and no compliance is claimed. Flash at your own risk and expect to recover with the rescue/stable firmware.
builds.stable_blocker: S360-410 PoE-PSU schematic verification (PRODUCT-POE-410-001 / PACKAGE-POE-410-001) + AirIQ sensor-stack bench evidence.
builds.notes: Kitchen PoE AirIQ + RoomIQ preview build row added by RELEASE-PREVIEW-WEBFLASH-BUILD-ROWS-001. Release-eligibility METADATA only: no firmware binary, GitHub Release, tag, manifest.json, or firmware/sources.json is produced by this PR; the S360-KIT-KITCHEN-P candidate bundle stays hidden / not buyable. NOT stable, NOT recommended, NOT a customer default, NOT in release_one_required_configs. Stable stays blocked by S360-410 (PRODUCT-POE-410-001) + AirIQ sensor-stack bench evidence; no hardware / bench / compliance proof is claimed.

No bench evidence and no compliance is claimed. Flash at your own risk and expect to recover with the rescue/stable firmware.
builds.notes: Bedroom PoE RoomIQ-only preview build row added by RELEASE-PREVIEW-WEBFLASH-BUILD-ROWS-001 (the smallest SELV RoomIQ-only PoE bundle). Release-eligibility METADATA only: no firmware binary, GitHub Release, tag, manifest.json, or firmware/sources.json is produced by this PR; the S360-KIT-BEDROOM-P candidate bundle stays hidden / not buyable. NOT stable, NOT recommended, NOT a customer default, NOT in release_one_required_configs. Stable stays blocked by S360-410 (PRODUCT-POE-410-001); no hardware / bench / compliance proof is claimed.

builds.release_note_warning: PREVIEW FIRMWARE — buildable and installable for testers only. This build is NOT hardware verified, NOT stable, NOT recommended, and NOT a customer default. No bench evidence and no compliance is claimed. Flash at your own risk and expect to recover with the rescue/stable firmware.
builds.stable_blocker: S360-410 PoE-PSU schematic verification (PRODUCT-POE-410-001 / PACKAGE-POE-410-001) + LED preview-to-stable gauntlet. LED stays preview.
builds.notes: Living-room / Corridor PoE RoomIQ + LED preview build row added by RELEASE-PREVIEW-WEBFLASH-BUILD-ROWS-001 (one buildable firmware shared by the S360-KIT-LIVING-P and S360-KIT-CORRIDOR-P bundles). This is the RoomIQ + LED sibling and is DISTINCT from the published VentIQ LED preview Ceiling-POE-VentIQ-RoomIQ-LED, which is unchanged. Release-eligibility METADATA only: no firmware binary, GitHub Release, tag, manifest.json, or firmware/sources.json is produced by this PR; the consuming candidate bundles stay hidden / not buyable. LED remains preview, never auto-stable. NOT stable, NOT recommended, NOT a customer default, NOT in release_one_required_configs. Stable stays blocked by S360-410 (PRODUCT-POE-410-001) + the LED preview-to-stable gauntlet; no hardware / bench / compliance proof is claimed.
